scripts.wasm: wasm-pack build .. --release --target web --out-dir site/src/wasm --out-name langbench -- --no-default-features --features wasm
scripts.dev: npm run wasm && npm run data && astro dev
scripts.build: npm run wasm && npm run data && astro sync && tsc --noEmit && astro build
scripts.typecheck: npm run wasm && npm run data && astro sync && tsc --noEmit
